title: Vibe Coding Is a Dead End
description: A critical analysis of the 'vibe coding' trend dominating 2026, exposing why intuition-driven approaches without structure ultimately fail in professional development. Perfect for designers evaluating AI-assisted coding tools.

title: Never mind the prompts, here's the thinking
description: A design studio rebuilt its entire process around AI over a year, discovering that speed wasn't the real benefit—deeper thinking and problem-solving were. This candid reflection reveals the hidden costs and true value of AI integration in creative work.

title: The face was never the point
description: This essay challenges designers' assumptions about creating animacy and emotional connection in interfaces, arguing it's triggered rather than designed. Essential reading for anyone working with interactive experiences or AI personas.

title: The Fable 5 Blackout: What It Proved About Running Claude Code and Hermes Together
description: A case study analyzing a major platform outage that demonstrates critical patterns in AI architecture and vendor dependency. Vital for product leaders evaluating infrastructure risks in AI-driven systems.

title: CircleChat
description: A new tool enabling AI agents to collaborate with human oversight through familiar interfaces (Slack, task boards, management systems). Represents an emerging product category for human-AI team workflows.

title: Termi Protocol
description: A visualization tool that lets teams watch AI coding agents build systems in real-time within 3D environments. Bridges the transparency gap in AI-assisted development processes.

title: Pennen
description: A minimal journaling app offering one quiet handwritten page daily without algorithmic feeds or AI recommendations. Reflects growing user demand for intentional, distraction-free digital spaces.

title: Caveman for Claude Code
description: A practical guide for implementing a specific approach to Claude Code workflows, including setup and use cases. Useful reference for developers and teams adopting AI coding assistants.
